title: nasturtium pubescens
intro: Nasturtium pubescens, also known as desert nasturtium or Mexican tarragon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Nasturtium pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its leaves can also be used in salads for their peppery flavor.
